description: From the manufacturer The professional of adhesives and sealants BOSTIK GRIZZLY TAPE American Ribbon Extruded PE tarpaulin tape, extremely strong and resistant to stress. Suitable for craft applications, repairs, fixings, reinforcements and much more on any material. High tensile strength thanks to extruded PE technology and dense weave (70 meshes per square inch). Simple to use, tears with your hands in both directions. Water resistant, UV resistant, weather and temperature resistant. High tensile strength Perfect for long-lasting applications Resistant to all weather conditions, temperature and UV rays Waterproof, also perfect for outdoor use Can be easily cut with your hands in both directions Thick weaving, 70 mesh per square inch Can be removed without leaving any marks Perfect for any kind of repair Exceptional tensile strength Perfect for outdoor use Water-resistant
